free_text: Details of counter telesc., no data
Protons and deuterons from Ni-58 bombarded by 14.8 MeV
Enriched Ni-58,  diameter 2.7 cm, thickness 10 mg/cm2,
total weight 61.9 mg.  95.6%. Ni-58 and 4.4% Ni-60.
Associated alpha particle method was used to detect the
Energy spectra and angular distribution of emitted
proton or deuteron were measured with a counter
specifically to allow measurements at backward angles.
Ang.resolution varies from +-7 deg at 30 deg to +-4 deg
Absolute, recoil alpha counting for incoming neutrons.
